text: Being here, a subtle strangeness settles around me. The glass walls and empty chairs in the first space feel anticipatory, as though I am awaiting the arrival of ideas or people. In the next space, bright colors and the emphasis on research evoke curiosity, appreciation for human innovation, and a sense that I am on the threshold of discovery. Yet, I am quietly aware of my presence as both an observer and a participant in this unfolding intellectual landscape. I feel both at home and slightly displaced—invited to ponder but never quite to belong.
